name: Tourist Sunny Apartment
description: A cozy and fully-equipped apartment in the heart of Anchorage. Perfect for families looking for a warm retreat after a day of glacier exploring. Self check-in available.

name: Snow Palace
description: Experience royal luxury at the Snow Palace. Featuring world-class dining prepared by Michelin-star chefs heated indoor pools and opulent suites tailored for royalty.

name: City Break Inn
description: Modern vibrant and centrally located. City Break Inn is your perfect hub for business or leisure offering express check-in premium coffee and a 24/7 fitness center.

name: Oceanview Retreat
description: Wake up to the sound of crashing waves. This exclusive adults-only retreat offers unparalleled ocean views personalized 24/7 butler service and private cabanas.

name: Mountain Whisper Resort
description: Nestled deep in the Carpathian mountains this premium cabin offers direct ski-in/ski-out access an authentic wood-burning fireplace and traditional organic meals.
